nl_plain: Use this independent CRM example: Execute CRM flow: locate contact or create if missing by phone <phone> and email <email> ; after that open opportunity '<deal_title>' with budget <budget> ; after that plan meeting at <when> [retrieval_example RE001]
dsl_yaml:
dsl: v0.3
flow: api_contact_deal_meeting
vars:
  phone: +7 960 001-10-01
  email: client.pool01@example.com
  deal_title: Retrieval Pool Deal 01
  budget: 107000
  when: tomorrow
steps:
- id: s1_contact
  op: contact.find_or_create
  input:
    phone: ${phone}
    email: ${email}
- id: s2_deal
  op: deal.create
  input:
    title: ${deal_title}
    budget: ${budget}
    tags:
    - demo
- id: s3_meeting
  op: meeting.schedule
  input:
    deal:
      id: ${s2_deal.id}
    when: ${when}

nl_plain: Use this independent CRM example: Execute CRM flow: locate contact or create if missing by email <email> ; after that open opportunity '<title>' with budget <budget> ; after that add follow-up activity 'Follow up with client' due <due> ; after that create quotation for the deal with amount <budget> ; after that send email notification to <email_to> [retrieval_example RE057]
dsl_yaml:
dsl: v0.3
flow: api_full_commercial_cycle
vars:
  email: client.pool29@example.com
  title: Retrieval Pool Deal 29
  budget: 380000
  due: tomorrow
  email_to: audit.pool29@example.com
steps:
- id: s1_contact
  op: contact.find_or_create
  input:
    email: ${email}
- id: s2_deal
  op: deal.create
  input:
    title: ${title}
    budget: ${budget}
    tags:
    - cycle
- id: s3_activity
  op: activity.create
  input:
    deal:
      id: ${s2_deal.id}
    type: To Do
    summary: Follow up with client
    due: ${due}
- id: s4_quote
  op: deal.create_quotation
  input:
    deal:
      id: ${s2_deal.id}
    amount: ${budget}
- id: s5_email
  op: notify.email
  input:
    to: ${email_to}
    subject: Automated notification
    attach: ${quotation.pdf_path}

nl_plain: Reference CRM automation pattern: Automate this CRM request: locate contact or create if missing by email <email> ; after that open opportunity '<title>' with budget <budget> ; after that change opportunity stage to New with probability 40 ; after that check watchdog condition for deal status ; after that send email notification to <email_to> [retrieval_example RE059]
dsl_yaml:
dsl: v0.3
flow: api_stage_watch_notify
vars:
  email: client.pool30@example.com
  title: Retrieval Pool Deal 30
  budget: 310000
  email_to: audit.pool30@example.com
steps:
- id: s1_contact
  op: contact.find_or_create
  input:
    email: ${email}
- id: s2_deal
  op: deal.create
  input:
    title: ${title}
    budget: ${budget}
    tags:
    - watch
- id: s3_stage
  op: deal.update_stage
  input:
    deal:
      id: ${s2_deal.id}
    stage: New
    probability: 40
- id: s4_watch
  op: watchdog
  input:
    deal:
      id: ${s2_deal.id}
    condition: deal.status == 'won'
- id: s5_notify
  op: notify.email
  input:
    to: ${email_to}
    subject: Automated notification
